synopsis:
Luke Skywalker is placed on trial for the negligent death of Captain Shira Brie. A panel led by Leia, General Rieekan, and General Duron Veertag reviews the evidence, clears him of all charges, and reinstates him at the rank of commander.

Afterward, a pilot named Gemmer complains that a souvenir rock from the old Golrath base keeps projecting images at night. The Rebel leaders discover that Golrath's volcanic minerals record light images of their surroundings and replay them as holograms once cooled. Fearing the Imperials, who now hold Golrath, could extract the location of the Rebel base at Arbra, Leia personally leads an expedition to destroy any trace of it. Golrath Station is now commanded by the demoted Lieutenant Mils Giel, who learns of the mineral's properties and summons TIE fighters to defend the base.

X-wings and Y-wings clash with the Imperial fighters over Golrath while Leia dives through the battle and descends on a parabelt rocket harness to overload the reactor core. Giel corners her and seals the exits, willing to die to kill the Rebel leader, but Leia distracts him with her harness and escapes, radioing Lando to meet her. Enraged at his failure, Giel fires a parting shot at a passing X-wing before evacuating just as the base explodes. The ship he hit is Luke's, and the damage strands him behind as the rest of the fleet jumps to hyperspace, leaving him to face a fresh squad of TIE fighters.
title: Star Wars (1977) #65: Golrath Never Forgets
